head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to the Commission to Negotiate Peace

div.p: 2567. Sailing Imperator July 21st Monday noon, with Mrs. Polk, two children and maid accompanied by G. Howland Shaw, Diplomatic Secretary and C. E. MacEachran, Drafting Officer. I assume Consul at Brest will arrange for transportation from Brest to Paris on arrival of ship. Please confirm.
Please notify Secretary Lansing by wireless that I regret I could not await his arrival, as President insisted it was better I should leave as soon as possible.
